channel.title: Human Affairs
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Human Affairs

item.title: Introduction: Art as a Remedy for the Corruption of Consciousness'

item.description: Article by James Connelly DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humaff-2024-0081

item.title: The Artist and the Community: The Subversion of the Nude
item.description: Article by James Connelly DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/humaff-2024-0061

item.title: Peter Skagestad: Exploring the Philosophy of R. G. Collingwood: From History and Method to Art and Politics
